description: Building AI-powered chatbot platforms with multi-channel integrations at a software outsourcing agency. Full-stack ownership from backend APIs to mobile apps.
highlights: Developed NestJS + GraphQL backend for chatbot data management, integrated with Python AI services in a dual-backend architecture
Personally integrated all 4 communication channels — Facebook, Zalo, Microsoft Teams, and embeddable web widget
Built React/Next.js admin dashboard for chatbot configuration and conversation analytics
Delivered chatbot solutions for enterprise clients including UEH, SKHCN, Citeka, and IFC
Maintained self-hosted Kubernetes (Minikube) staging environment for team testing before production deployment
Built internal mobile app with React Native for chatbot testing and demo

description: Led a 10-member intern team at one of Vietnam's largest IT companies, coordinating backend and frontend collaboration on a student management system.
highlights: Appointed team leader by mentor — distributed tasks, ensured on-time delivery, and coordinated communication among team members
Built RESTful APIs for a student management system using .NET and SQL Server
Coordinated with a separate frontend team to integrate APIs and ship the complete product

description: Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering. GPA: 3.16/4.0.
highlights: Capstone: SmartFarmManager — IoT-integrated smart farm management system for poultry farming with disease diagnosis, vaccination scheduling, and environmental monitoring
Relevant coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Development, Databases
